park_name: Rotary Park - Self Contained Caravan and RV Park

reviews.review_text: Great spot
Stayed for 5 days  a cheep stay over and clows to every thing
Well maintained, skip, water and dump point, $10 per night.
Basic, great value for money. Only suits fully self-contained caravan or RV. Has a dump point.
Great camping spot in Echuca with dump point and water, close to town, large gravel sites only $10 per night for 2 people
Awesome little caravan park, great little spot to pull up for a few days and explore everything echuca has to offer. Highly recommend and will definitely be back.
For $10 per night it's a clean tidy expansive camping area.  No toilets,  but a dump point for campers only.  Alot of spots near the river, but many are shaded on the lower level.

Open ground and dirt gravel parkinh. Can get a bit dusty with vehicles passing. Reverse in agsinst creek bank. Can get water here but no toilets. Has a dump point. Cost was $10/night. If need power can use generator.

It's a fully self contained park. Plenty of places to park , alongside the river bank.
For $10 per night , it's a nice place to sit and relax
Great place. We stayed 9 days and loved it. $10 pn. Potable water and dump point, must be self contained.
Great central place to stay
Nice and quiet camp site. Can have a camp fire. No toilet facilities available for campers. $10 camp fee per car. Toilet dump point available.
Great place to stay conveniently located and at $10 a night great value.
Self contained
I stayed 2 nights in October very nice place as long as you are self sufficient. Great place to use as a base to get in and out of town
Good place
Excellent place to stop, quiet location, you must be fully self contained to stay here.
At $10 per night, it's a rippa bewdie bargain mate. Flat sites, easy access, potable water fill point, and a dump point.

For a cost of ten dollars a night clean no noise good two nights to kick back until hook the van went to  into town 1 - 2 klm visit the port checked out the paddle steamer's  lots of shopping there great 👍

Well maintained park with various location options. Great price at $10 per night including dump point. We were passing through but you could easily stay more than one night as water is available, though not at each site. Dog friendly.

Fantastic spot quiet. Up the back
on the river
What Great place to stay at, nice & clean, plenty of room, close to all you need. We thoroughly enjoyed our stay.
A great place to stay.
Large open area easy parking Site very muddy after rain.
Great spot to pull up & very handy to local attractions. 😎
Great spot plenty of room
Quiet place
We arrived late just park. And donate $10 for a night.

Wonderful facility for both travellers and the local community. Nestled in next to the Campaspe River, it is a perfect spot for self-contained RV travellers to spend the night. Conveniently located walking distance to town along a cycle track and to Bandicoot Brewing. Please remember to pay via the honesty box. Thanks Rotary - you're doing a great job for your community.
Great Place for a few days or more. Dump point, water, rubbish bins all for $10 per night, couldn't ask for more.
$10 pn if you use water and the dump point. A bit too dusty for me but an OK stop in Echuca.
Advised not to stay because young locals causing trouble with campers at night and no support from authorities
Good safe place to stay, it’s a $10 fee not donation, has water

Love this place.
It's good to see a lot of caravans using the area.

The only thing is that it's a shame that the toilets are not open, but I can understand why.
Right on a creek, dump point & water.  Great spot.
Review 3/5 because of no toilets. Due to vandles
$10 to stay one night nice spot

Wonderful park! Clean and plenty of space. $10 donation per night. I spoke to the Mike ( on the phone) as i wasn’t sure where the donation box was located. He stated that not many people donate!!!!!! HOW UNAUSTRALIAN !!! This money goes back into the community! PLEASE DO THE RIGHT THING!!

A great spot. Quite and heaps of space. Lovely sitting by the river.
Ladies toilets were locked, apparently they are only open for concerts and such.
Donation of $10 is very fare.
Didn't bother. Went in and straight out.
Great place to stop overnight, plenty of room.
$10 a night, water and dump point but no amenities. Close to the Port of Echuca.
Very dusty no grassy areas for tents.
The rotary committee should be congratulated. We used the dump piont, it was clean and easy to access, and we were very happy to donate the $ 5 for the use

Perfect for an overnighter. You do need to be fully self-contained, no power or facilities. But there is a dump point that you can pay $5 to use if you're not staying or included with your stay. On the bank of the Campaspe River with plenty of Birdlife.
The park was great except there was no facilities.   One toilet would have been nice.
Great place to stay a few days   plenty to see in the town and great shopping g near by
Nice riverside spot. Room for vans and a dump point.

Stayed here many times on our travels and its quiet, plenty of room for larger Motorhomes.
Some weekends they have the trains running as well
Quiet spot beside the river
Good safe place to camp. Don't forget to pay your $10 a night
Great clean place llarge flat area only $10 per night  RVS and cararans only  will defnerntly be back
Nice space just beside a river. Have to be self contained. $10 p/n. Dump point available for $5. Picnic tables, dog friendly.
Quiet over night. Self contained caravans,campers & rv's. Dogs allowed on lead.
Very good for stopping for one night

Excellent location for self contained vehicles. Purchase firewood.water available dump available  for $10 night  great service.
Thanks Rotarians we'll done we appreciate it.
Cheap stay, $10 a night ,have to be self contained
Great area plenty room all over for camping a night or a week. $10 a night, dump point, must be fully self sufficant. Nice for a walk, few minutrs from town central.
Not free $10.00 a day 5 dollars to use dump point. Toilets are locked because they don't want to pay for cleaning. $5.00 dollars for water. Take your rubbish with you
Great spot, no toilets open.
Its the place for relaxing
Great spot to drop in when in Echuca. Water and dump point.

Great place to stay
Safe to unhook and do some exploring
Only $10 donation a night
Good area for big rigs, self contained
Quiet. Lovely Birdlife. Cheap camping. We didn't use any facilities apart from the rubbish skip. Dusty but totally happy with it all.

Great little place for a quick stop over, need to be fully self contained, has fresh water and dump point, usually can swim and fish here but due to the floods the water is very ordinary,  cost $10 a night +donation  which helps maintain the place,  They do have showers and toilets there but for some reason they are not open to the campers , which is frustrating,  most people would pay extra for this service. (think thats a council thing) We have stayed here a few times now, I know alot of people don't pay they think they are entitled, so when this is no longer available, they will be the first to complain....
It's free. You have to be self contained as no toilets, water or power. Good spot for a few days.
Great place to stop and rest. Dispose rubbish etc. very cheap and safe
Good first show. Hope for better in the future .
Good spot for night or two.
